titles.title: It Matters to the Master – v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If life gets you down and you feel more broken than whole When your wounds go deeper than words and you can't tell a soul I may not know what you're going through I may not can make that high mountain move But one thing I found that I really want you to know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If it matters to you it matters to the Master He wants to share The burdens you bear Whisper peace When your world gets shattered If its your greatest joy Or your deepest pain Or your really needing an answer If it matters to you It matters to the Master.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Friend, do you think the maker and giver of life Is far too busy to care about your troubles and strifes He sees the sparrow that falls to the ground And he heals the tears that don't make a sound If you only knew how precious you are in His sight.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If its your greatest joy Or your deepest pain Or your really needing an answer If it matters to you It matters to the Master.
